name: Adityakeerti
bio: Final-year B.Tech Computer Science (AI/ML) student with hands-on experience in full-stack development and production-grade machine learning systems. Architected 58 REST API endpoints and designed BCNF-normalized database schemas in Spring Boot; built computer vision pipelines achieving near-perfect data extraction precision and significantly accelerating inference throughput. National hackathon winner with deployed solutions in active commercial use.
